kstreams/poc-ddd-aggregates/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java source and target version property to 11 to align with the target JDK.
kstreams/poc-ddd-aggregates/pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project continues to compile against Java 8 semantics, failing to utilize Java 11 features or potentially causing runtime incompatibilities if Java 11-only APIs are used.

kstreams/poc-ddd-aggregates/pom.xml.general_idea: Replace separate source and target compiler configuration with the unified release flag.
kstreams/poc-ddd-aggregates/pom.xml.why_exists: The 'release' flag is the standard way to compile for a specific Java version in modern Maven compiler plugins (3.6+), ensuring consistent class file version and bootstrap classpath. While source/target might still work, release is the intended migration path for J11+.

kstreams/poc-ddd-aggregates/pom.xml.general_idea: Bump the Maven Compiler Plugin version to 3.6.2.
